title: Flood relief request for damaged ground floor unit
location: Taman Sri Muda, Shah Alam, Selangor

locationMeta.locationText: Taman Sri Muda, Shah Alam, Selangor
locationMeta.formattedAddress: Taman Sri Muda, 40400 Shah Alam, Selangor, Malaysia

summary: Household flood damage claim awaiting a clearer bank statement and one replacement photo of the damaged kitchen flooring.

intake.citizenSummary: My house was flooded after heavy rain and I need support for damaged appliances, flooring, and cleaning expenses.
intake.adminSummary: Citizen submitted a flood relief request with residence proof, photos, and a cost note. Packet is credible but one financial document and one clearer evidence image are still needed before routing.

latestInternalNote: Citizen appears eligible. Waiting on clearer support documents before routing to finance.

title: Broken streetlamp creating safety risk near pedestrian crossing

locationMeta.formattedAddress: Jalan Bukit Bintang, 55100 Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

summary: A nighttime safety complaint with strong location detail and photo proof is under municipal review.

intake.citizenSummary: The streetlamp beside the zebra crossing has been out for three nights and the area is dark for people walking home.
intake.adminSummary: Public lighting complaint includes geotagged photos and clear site description. Suitable for maintenance dispatch after routine validation.

latestInternalNote: Location clarity is excellent. Awaiting district confirmation.

title: Large pothole near school drop-off lane

locationMeta.formattedAddress: Jalan Kampung Pandan 1, 25150 Kuantan, Pahang, Malaysia

summary: A fresh complaint about road damage near a school access route has entered triage with strong photo evidence.

intake.citizenSummary: A deep pothole is forming at the school drop-off area and drivers are swerving into the opposite lane to avoid it.
intake.adminSummary: Road hazard complaint received with two images and a short hazard explanation. Requires prioritization due to school traffic.

title: Business licence renewal reminder and document verification

locationMeta.formattedAddress: Lebuh Pantai, George Town, 10300 Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

summary: Renewal packet has been routed with licence copy, tax receipt, and a pending verification of the latest SSM extract.

intake.citizenSummary: I am renewing my small business licence and want to confirm which documents are still missing before the deadline.
intake.adminSummary: Renewal case already has most mandatory records. Routing completed, with one corporate verification item still marked as pending.

latestInternalNote: Queued for licensing officer final verification.

title: Identity document verification for aid enrolment

locationMeta.formattedAddress: Jalan Bandar, 81700 Pasir Gudang, Johor, Malaysia

summary: Identity verification is in progress with the operations team after the citizen supplied replacement scans.

intake.citizenSummary: I need to verify my identity documents so my household assistance registration can move forward.
intake.adminSummary: Verification packet now includes replacement IC scan and address proof. Internal review is underway.

latestInternalNote: Replacement scans look acceptable. Awaiting final officer sign-off.

title: Blocked drainage causing repeated roadside flooding

locationMeta.formattedAddress: Persiaran Bayan Indah, 11900 Bayan Lepas, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

summary: Drainage maintenance issue has been resolved after field cleaning and citizen confirmation.

intake.citizenSummary: The roadside drain overflows whenever it rains and water collects in front of our apartment entrance.
intake.adminSummary: Complaint verified and assigned to field team. Resolution confirmed after maintenance visit and photo update.

title: Renewal support request with expired supporting certificate
summary: Renewal packet was rejected because the mandatory certification uploaded was already expired.

intake.citizenSummary: I tried to renew my permit but I may have submitted the wrong supporting certificate.
intake.adminSummary: Supporting certificate expired before submission date. Request closed with instructions to reapply using current documentation.
